message:
test(e2e): Add keyboard shortcuts E2E tests

Add comprehensive E2E tests for keyboard shortcuts functionality:

Passing tests (13):
- ? key opens help modal
- / key opens spotlight search
- g+h sequence navigates to home
- Help modal displays categories and shortcuts
- Help modal closes via Escape/backdrop/X button
- Help modal has proper ARIA attributes
- Sequence keys display with "then" separator

Skipped tests (6):
- Meta+/ (browser DevTools conflict)
- Meta+N (browser new window conflict)
- g+b/g+w/g+c (race condition from homepage)
- Input focus behavior (lazy loading race)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
